song.title: Open the Eyes of My Heart, Lord
song.author: Paul Baloche
song.presentation: V1 C V1 C V2 C V1
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E Open the eyes of my heart, Lord .B Open the eyes of my heart . A I want to see You . E I want to see You
[C] . B C#m To see You high and lifted up .A B Shining in the light of Your glory .B C#m Pour out Your power and love . A B As we sing holy, holy, holy, . E I want to see You
[v2] Holy, holy, holy, Holy, holy, holy, Holy, holy, holy, I want to see You
